meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Antigravity Template to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no portfolio' trap. Use our Antigravity project template and Claude Code to build a high-converting MVP in hours, not weeks. Start now.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap kills SaaS momentum. You don't need years of experience; you need a high-fidelity MVP that demonstrates real utility. By leveraging the Antigravity project template and Claude Code, you can automate boilerplate, focus on core business logic, and ship a revenue-ready product in a single afternoon.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank screen, paralyzed by the 'no portfolio' syndrome. Prospects don't care about your resume; they care about your ability to ship. The gap between an idea and a live, monetizable SaaS is not technical genius—it is velocity.

We’ve engineered the Antigravity project template to collapse that gap. By combining this modular architecture with the raw power of Claude Code, you transform from a dreamer into a ship-first founder. It is time to stop waiting for permission and start building an asset that proves your value to the market.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Initialize your project with the high-performance Antigravity template to ensure industry-standard architecture from commit zero.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity SaaS boilerplate. Include authentication, Stripe integration, and a responsive dashboard layout.

steps.title: Define the Business Logic
steps.description: Translate your unique value proposition into a clear, functional requirements document that Claude Code can execute.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the core business requirements: a user subscription portal with role-based access control and a data visualization dashboard. Generate the necessary database schema.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Implement schema for subscription tiers and user roles"

steps.title: Configure the Auth Layer
steps.description: Secure your product immediately. Never build auth from scratch; leverage the template's pre-configured hooks for rapid deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the authentication provider using the template's built-in Auth module. Ensure redirect flows are set for protected routes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Set up Clerk auth provider and secure /dashboard routes"

steps.title: Integrate Monetization Hooks
steps.description: A portfolio project without payment rails is just a hobby. Connect Stripe to validate your product's ability to capture revenue.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Integrate the Stripe checkout session flow. Create a webhook handler to update user status in the database upon successful payment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Add Stripe checkout session and webhook listener"

steps.title: Automated Testing & Polish
steps.description: Ensure your MVP is bulletproof. Use Claude Code to run automated tests on your critical paths before pushing to production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate integration tests for the sign-up and payment flow. Identify and fix any edge cases in the user journey.

pro_tips: Prioritize shipping the 'happy path' first; ignore edge cases until you have your first paying user.
Use Claude Code to document your code as you write it, creating an instant 'technical case study' for your portfolio.
Always deploy to a staging environment before main; use the Antigravity CI/CD pipeline to automate this.
Focus on the UI/UX polish of the landing page; it is the only part of your portfolio most people will actually interact with.
If you get stuck, use Claude Code to explain the error contextually rather than copy-pasting raw logs.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, share your project link on LinkedIn and Twitter with a breakdown of the problem you solved. Your portfolio is now a living business.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for the drawer and start building for the market. Leverage the tools that elite founders use to ship faster and earn more. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
